name: Tequila Lime Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree garlic, Parmesan cheese, lime juice, tequila, and anchovies.
2. Add Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and 1/2 cup olive oil to the mixture.
3. Pulse until well combined.
4. Slowly drizzle in the remaining olive oil while continuing to pulse.
5. Season with freshly cracked black pepper.
